input.instructions: Derive the isothermal force law F_iso(x) for a freely jointed chain of n segments of length l as a function of the end-to-end distance x, using the entropy S(x) derived from the microcanonical ensemble of random walks.

Question:
Derive the isothermal force law F_iso(x) for a freely jointed chain of n segments of length l as a function of the end-to-end distance x, using the entropy S(x) derived from the microcanonical ensemble of random walks.

results.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: F_iso(x) = (3 k_B T x) / (n l^2)
JUSTIFICATION: Force is the derivative of entropy with respect to distance.
